Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: caps by function [300213423], caps (headgear) [300046094], headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Tight-fitting waterproof caps, made of rubber or rubberized fabric, worn to keep the hair dry while swimming or bathing.
Gorra impermeable muy ajustada, realizada de goma o materiales engomados, que se lleva para mantener el pelo seco mientras se nada o se toma un baño.
Nauwsluitende waterafstotende hoofddeksels, vaak gemaakt van rubber, die worden gedragen om het haar droog te houden en samen te houden tijdens het zwemmen of baden.
緊貼頭部的防水無邊帽，由橡膠或橡膠布製成，於游泳或沐浴時戴，讓頭髮保持乾燥。
Eng anliegende wasserfeste Kappe, aus Gummi oder gummierten Stoff, getragen um das Haar während des Schwimmens oder Badens trocken zu halten.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)

Term_Source.Page: Term suggested by Valerie Mendes and Avril Hart, V & A Residency 3/93.
